content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：皮克曼EP·疯画奇旅，今日发布～欢迎大家收听、下载及分享～如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

**忘却前夜OST：皮克曼EP·疯画奇旅**
画家已寻觅到那恐怖的艺术，他掀开绘布，在投身前，邀友人赴一场色彩爆炸的癫狂奇旅。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: Pickman EP "A Painter's Mad Adventure" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

**Morimens OST: Pickman EP · A Painter's Mad Adventure**
The painter had finally found his terrifying art. He pulled back the canvas, and before he dove in, invited a friend on a wild journey with a chaotic explosion of color.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：皮克曼EP·疯画奇旅
